creator: dotzsoh-singapore
caption:
Soaking in the vibes in #osaka with @kkdaysg travel quest ✨🇯🇵🚆🍱🌆✨ Last week to get 1-FOR-1 Universal Studios, B1F1 Day Tours and save up to additional $150 for your travel to Japan! #kkdaytravelquestkansai #japan 

with my 3days #kansaipass I explored the most searched places in #osakajapan fuss free! 

📍 ShinSekai New World - densely concentrated collection dining &  shopping street 
📍 Dotombori Shinshabashi - filled with towering neon signs, clubs, bars, and restaurants serving up local specialties 
🍲yakiniku BBQ 
🥩sukiyaki & wagyu shabu shabu 
📍 Namba Yasaka Shrine - famous for its lion head-shaped building 

🎞️ @dotzsoh @dotzsoh2 
#dotzsoh #kkdaysg

transcription.text: Uh, yeah, wait a minute, get it how you live it Ten toes in when we standing on business, I'm a Big stepper, underground methods Top notch hoes get the most, not the lesser Straight terror, product of your errors Pushing culture, baby, got that power that you can't measure Kremzada, the one who get the weather Swerving while I bump in Project Patcha Rolling through the city with the big dogs Fuck the laws, loyal with me, we ain't gotta count Silly on silent, put the panic in the pillar loud That's how you make the money pop for everyone involved And if you don't deserve a cut, then we gon' cut em off
